title: No robarás... (a menos que sea necesario)
original_title: No robarás... (a menos que sea necesario)
overview: Lucia, a 16-year-old punk rock fan and singer, lives with her family. When her mother is accused of attempted murder after pushing her step-father down a flight of stairs, Lucia is left in charge of her siblings.
